name: paper-and-book-to-visual-learning
description: Turn papers, books, and reports into visual learning albums, editable PPTs, and interactive bilingual readers.

interface.displayName: Paper and Book to Visual Learning
interface.shortDescription: Turn difficult long-form sources into guided visual learning
interface.longDescription: Transform papers, books, reports, and other difficult long-form sources into model-generated learning albums, editable presentation reports, or interactive bilingual readers for non-specialist learners.
defaultPrompt: Turn this paper into a visual learning album.
Turn this book into an editable presentation report.
Build an interactive bilingual reader for this source.
